data.title: Write structural tests for pre-commit dep marker and bypass gate marker in test-onboarding-skill.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add two new structural test assertions to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh targeting the
structural markers that will be added by the implementation tasks.

Per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5 (instruction-file boundary), tests for non-executable
LLM instruction files must target deterministic structural boundaries — section headings,
comment markers, referential integrity — NOT behavioral correctness of LLM instruction content.

### Test 1: test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md exists
- When: the required dependency section is scanned for the structural marker <!-- REQUIRED_DEP: pre-commit -->
- Then: exit 0 (marker present means pre-commit is marked as a required dep in the machine-readable contract)
- This test is RED before the SKILL.md change (marker does not yet exist)

### Test 2: test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md exists
- When: the Batch Group 5 hook-install section is scanned for the structural marker <!-- hook-install: bypass-gates -->
- Then: exit 0 (marker present means the hook install commit is marked as gate-bypassing)
- This test is RED before the SKILL.md change (marker does not yet exist)

### Implementation Steps
1. Read tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh to understand existing test structure
2. Add test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker() function after existing dep-scan related tests
3. Add test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker() function after existing batch-group related tests
4. Call both new test functions in the main execution block (after existing test calls)
5. Update .test-index with RED marker for both test functions

### File to Modify
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

### RED marker requirement
Before committing, add RED markers to .test-index for both tests:
```
plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker]
plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker]
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0) — or test is marked RED per .test-index
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker function exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker function exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] Both test functions are called in the main execution block
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -qE "test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker|test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker"
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker] for onboarding SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker [test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker] for onboarding SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test assertions use grep on structural markers only (no behavioral content assertions)
  Verify: grep -A5 "test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker\|test_hook_install_bypass_gate_marker" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | grep -v "REQUIRED_DEP\|bypass-gates" | grep -qv "always\|must\|should\|will"
